LightningComponentBundle.description: Premium financial services profile widget: optional profile assembly Flow, CRM SOQL enrichment, optional prediction Flow, and Einstein summary.

property.name: coreCustomFieldsJson
property.label: [Data source] Core custom fields (JSON object)
property.description: Map widget logical keys to Account/Contact field API names OR flow:VariableName / flows:VariableName (same pattern as Business Profile Widget). Examples: {"tierSegment":"Customer_Tier__c"}, {"tierSegment":"flow:Tier_Out"}. Flow values require profile assembly flow API name and a run that sets those output variables. Allowed keys: tierSegment, investmentBalance, loanBalance, loanLimit, depositYtd, scores, riskProfile, customerSince, lastInteractionDate, lastUsedChannel, enrollments, kycStatus, twoFaStatus, profilePhotoUrl.

property.name: profileAssemblyFlowApiName
property.label: [Data source] Profile assembly flow API name
property.description: Autolaunched flow that sets profile via output variables (assignments, Get Records, subflows). Requires at least one output mapping (use [Asm flow output] fields and/or optional JSON below). SOQL still fills gaps.

property.name: profileAssemblyFlowRecordIdVariable
property.label: [Data source] Assembly flow input: record Id

property.name: profilePhotoFlowOutputVariable
property.label: [Profile assembly Flow] Profile photo output variable
property.description: API name of a Text (or Text Area) output variable on the profile assembly flow; its value at run time must be the image URL (https or org-relative path). Use this OR [Asm flow output] Profile photo URL (same logical mapping). If all photo mappings are blank, the widget uses [Header] Profile photo URL, core custom field profilePhotoUrl, Contact PhotoUrl, then initials.

property.name: assemblyOutFullName
property.label: [Asm flow output] Full name
property.description: Flow output variable API name (e.g. outFullName), or flow:Var / flows:Var, OR a SOQL field path on Account/Contact (e.g. Name, Account.Name on Contact). Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutFirstName
property.label: [Asm flow output] First name
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "firstName". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutLastName
property.label: [Asm flow output] Last name
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "lastName". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutCity
property.label: [Asm flow output] City
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "city". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutState
property.label: [Asm flow output] State / province
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "state". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutIndustry
property.label: [Asm flow output] Industry
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "industry". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutEmployees
property.label: [Asm flow output] Employees
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "employees". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutPhone
property.label: [Asm flow output] Phone
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "phone". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutEmail
property.label: [Asm flow output] Email
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "email". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutWebsite
property.label: [Asm flow output] Website
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "website". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutLastUsedChannel
property.label: [Asm flow output] Last used channel
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "lastUsedChannel" (text or picklist label string). SOQL still fills from Account when blank.

property.name: assemblyOutRevenue
property.label: [Asm flow output] Annual revenue
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "revenue". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutTierSegment
property.label: [Asm flow output] Tier / segment
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "tierSegment". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutPropensityScore
property.label: [Asm flow output] Propensity score
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "propensityScore". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutEngagementScore
property.label: [Asm flow output] Engagement score
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "engagementScore". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutChurnScore
property.label: [Asm flow output] Churn score
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "churnScore". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutLtvScore
property.label: [Asm flow output] LTV score
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "ltvScore". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutCrossSellScore
property.label: [Asm flow output] Cross-sell score
property.description: Flow Number output for AI Signals cross-sell numerator (shown as N / max; max is widget property).

property.name: assemblyOutSavingsRate
property.label: [Asm flow output] Savings rate (%)
property.description: Flow Number output; displayed as percent on AI Signals (e.g. 12.5 → 12.5%).

property.name: assemblyOutInvestmentBalance
property.label: [Asm flow output] Investment balance
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "investmentBalance". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutLoanBalance
property.label: [Asm flow output] Loan balance
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "loanBalance". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutDepositYtd
property.label: [Asm flow output] Deposits YTD
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "depositYtd". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutLoanLimit
property.label: [Asm flow output] Loan limit
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "loanLimit". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutRiskProfile
property.label: [Asm flow output] Risk profile
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "riskProfile". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutCustomerSince
property.label: [Asm flow output] Customer since
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "customerSince". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutLastInteraction
property.label: [Asm flow output] Last interaction
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "lastInteraction". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutMobileEnrolled
property.label: [Asm flow output] Mobile enrolled
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "mobileEnrolled". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutOnlineEnrolled
property.label: [Asm flow output] Online enrolled
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "onlineEnrolled". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutKycStatus
property.label: [Asm flow output] KYC status
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "kycStatus". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutTwoFaStatus
property.label: [Asm flow output] 2FA status
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "twoFaStatus". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutPaperlessEnrolled
property.label: [Asm flow output] Paperless enrolled
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "paperlessEnrolled". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutAlertsEnrolled
property.label: [Asm flow output] Alerts enrolled
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "alertsEnrolled". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutWireEnabled
property.label: [Asm flow output] Wire enabled
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "wireEnabled". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutStreet
property.label: [Asm flow output] Street
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "street". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutZip
property.label: [Asm flow output] Postal code
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "zip". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutAssignedBranch
property.label: [Asm flow output] Assigned branch
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "assignedBranch". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutBranchDistance
property.label: [Asm flow output] Branch distance
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "branchDistance". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutAssignedBranchAddress
property.label: [Asm flow output] Assigned branch address
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "assignedBranchAddress". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutAssignedBranchHours
property.label: [Asm flow output] Assigned branch hours
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "assignedBranchHours". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutAssignedBranchStatus
property.label: [Asm flow output] Assigned branch status
property.description: Flow output variable API name for widget slot "assignedBranchStatus". Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutNearbyBranches
property.label: [Asm flow output] Nearby branches
property.description: Flow output variable API name for "nearbyBranches" (Text JSON array of branch objects). Leave blank to skip.

property.name: assemblyOutPortfolioTrend
property.label: [Asm flow output] Portfolio trend (deprecated)
property.description: Reserved for Lightning page compatibility. Portfolio trend UI was removed; this value is ignored.

property.name: assemblyOutFinancialAccounts
property.label: [Asm flow output] Financial accounts
property.description: Flow output for Portfolio "Accounts" list: Text JSON array of objects. Keys: type, accountNumber (or number/mask/lastFour), balance, delta, deltaPositive. Example: [{"type":"Investment","accountNumber":"•••• 4821","balance":72061,"delta":"+4.2%","deltaPositive":true}]. Leave blank to use investment/loan balance placeholders.

property.name: assemblyOutMapLatitude
property.label: [Asm flow output] Map latitude
property.description: Flow Number (or Text) output for map pin. Optional if geocoding is on and billing address is populated.

property.name: assemblyOutMapLongitude
property.label: [Asm flow output] Map longitude
property.description: Flow Number (or Text) output for map pin. Pair with map latitude.

property.name: assemblyOutProfilePhotoUrl
property.label: [Asm flow output] Profile photo URL
property.description: API name of the Flow Text output variable that holds the image URL (same as [Profile assembly Flow] Profile photo output variable). Optional if you use that property or JSON key profilePhotoUrl instead.

property.name: geocodeBillingAddress
property.label: [Location] Geocode billing address for map
property.description: When true and lat/long are not set from Flow, Apex calls OpenStreetMap Nominatim (deploy Remote Site Setting in package). Set false to rely only on Flow coordinates or show fallback.

property.name: profileFlowOutputMapJson
property.label: [Data source] Profile output map JSON (advanced)
property.description: Optional. Full JSON map merged with [Asm flow output] fields; per-slot fields override the same key. Each value can be a Flow variable API name, flow:Var / flows:Var, or a SOQL field path (Account: dotted paths; Contact: MailingCity, Account.Industry, etc.). Example: {"city":"MailingCity","tierSegment":"flow:Tier_Output"}. SOQL-only maps do not require running the assembly flow.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: [Data source] Autolaunched flow API name (predictions)
property.description: Optional flow for prediction and recommendations on the Insight tab.

property.name: flowRecordIdVariable
property.label: [Data source] Flow input: record Id variable

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: [Data source] Einstein prompt template Id or API name
property.description: Template with a text input matching prompt input API name; receives prediction and recommendations JSON.

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: [Data source] Prompt template text input API name

property.name: insightRecommendationsPositiveMeansGood
property.label: [Insight] Recommendations: treat positive % as good
property.description: Same as classification model LWC: when true, positive recommendation impact uses the good (green) bar color.

property.name: servicesSuggestionCopyMobileBanking
property.label: [Services] Suggested step body: Mobile banking
property.description: Paragraph under Suggested next steps when not enrolled. Blank = built-in default.

property.name: servicesSuggestionCopyOnlineBanking
property.label: [Services] Suggested step body: Online banking
property.description: Paragraph under Suggested next steps when not enrolled. Blank = built-in default.

property.name: servicesSuggestionCopyWireTransfers
property.label: [Services] Suggested step body: Wire transfers
property.description: Paragraph under Suggested next steps when wires restricted. Blank = built-in default.

property.name: servicesSuggestionCopyPaperless
property.label: [Services] Suggested step body: Paperless
property.description: Paragraph under Suggested next steps when not enrolled. Blank = built-in default.

property.name: servicesSuggestionCopyAccountAlerts
property.label: [Services] Suggested step body: Account alerts
property.description: Paragraph under Suggested next steps when not enrolled. Blank = built-in default.

property.name: servicesSuggestionCopyKycCompliance
property.label: [Services] Suggested step body: KYC / compliance
property.description: Paragraph under Suggested next steps when KYC not complete. Blank = built-in default.

property.name: servicesSuggestionValueAddJson
property.label: [Services] Suggested steps: JSON map (advanced)
property.description: Optional JSON: service name to paragraph. Per-field properties above override JSON for the same service.

property.name: crossSellScoreMax
property.label: [AI Signals] Cross-sell score max (denominator)
property.description: Denominator for cross-sell display (e.g. 10 shows values like 5 / 10). Must be ≥ 1; invalid values default to 10.

property.name: signalGauge1FlowApiName
property.label: [Signals gauge 1] Inference flow API name
property.description: Autolaunched flow with a numeric output (variable below). Leave blank to use profile propensityScore from assembly/SOQL.

property.name: signalGauge1RecordIdVariable
property.label: [Signals gauge 1] Flow input: record Id variable

property.name: signalGauge1OutputFormat
property.label: [Signals gauge 1] Output format
property.description: percent = logistic/classification (0–100 ring). decimal/currency/regression = numeric center text; set Ring scale max to drive arc.

property.name: signalGauge1RingScaleMax
property.label: [Signals gauge 1] Ring scale max (optional)
property.description: For decimal/currency: max value for a full ring (e.g. 1000000). Leave blank for no colored arc (value only).

property.name: signalGauge2FlowApiName
property.label: [Signals gauge 2] Inference flow API name
property.description: Leave blank to use profile engagementScore from assembly/SOQL.

property.name: signalGauge2RecordIdVariable
property.label: [Signals gauge 2] Flow input: record Id variable

property.name: signalGauge3FlowApiName
property.label: [Signals gauge 3] Inference flow API name
property.description: Leave blank to use profile churnScore from assembly/SOQL.

property.name: signalGauge3RecordIdVariable
property.label: [Signals gauge 3] Flow input: record Id variable

property.name: showStructureTab
property.label: [Visible] Show Structure tab
property.description: Org chart and key contacts: on Account, same related-account logic as Business Profile; on Contact, linked accounts via AccountContactRelation and colleagues on primary Account.

property.name: showSparkline
property.label: [Visible] Portfolio sparkline (deprecated)
property.description: Reserved for Lightning page compatibility. Sparkline was removed; this flag is ignored.

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: 42 themes across 8 families. ORIGINAL: obsidian (default), midnight, graphite, ivory. NEUTRALS: dusk, slate, parchment, onyx, fog. GREENS/ORANGES: forest, ember, sage, copper, verdant. BLUES/GREYS: steel, mercury, arctic, indigo, glacier. MID-TONES: bordeaux, pewter, walnut, denim, moss. SF LIGHT: birch, mist, cashew, mineral, blush, chamois. WEALTH MGMT: bullion, prussian, coutts, vault, endowment, trust. BANKING: cobalt, heritage, civic, cardinal, meridian, union. Wealth and banking themes require a matching accentColor override — see documentation. Individual [Theme] color properties below override when changed from defaults.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, shows 4 theme toggle buttons in the widget header for live switching during demos. Keep false in production.

property.name: fieldKeyColor
property.label: [Theme] Field label color (optional)
property.description: Color for row labels (Industry, Employees, AI Signals keys, etc.). Use #rrggbb, #rgb, or rgb()/rgba(). Leave blank for theme default.

property.name: headerGradientStyle
property.label: [Header] Gradient style
property.description: radial: dual radial layers; linear: diagonal blend; solid: flat background primary.

property.name: profilePhotoUrl
property.label: [Header] Profile photo URL (optional)
property.description: Static HTTPS URL for the avatar (overrides Flow output). Leave blank to use [Profile assembly Flow] Profile photo output variable, [Asm flow output] Profile photo URL, core field profilePhotoUrl, Contact PhotoUrl, or initials.

property.name: textScalePercent
property.label: [Typography] Text size (%)
property.description: Scales all widget text (85–160). 100 = default design size.

property.name: textEmphasis
property.label: [Typography] Emphasis
property.description: medium: bolder name/KPIs and clearer title. strong: also heavier tabs and brighter meta.

property.name: coreCustomFieldsJson
property.label: [Data source] Core custom fields (JSON object)
property.description: Logical key to field API name, or flow:Var / flows:Var (requires profile assembly flow). Same pattern as Business Profile Widget.

property.name: profileAssemblyFlowApiName
property.label: [Data source] Profile assembly flow API name

property.name: profileAssemblyFlowRecordIdVariable
property.label: [Data source] Assembly flow input: record Id

property.name: profilePhotoFlowOutputVariable
property.label: [Profile assembly Flow] Profile photo output variable
property.description: Text output variable API name on the profile assembly flow whose value is the image URL. Same mapping as [Asm flow output] Profile photo URL if you prefer that slot.

property.name: flowRecordIdVariable
property.label: [Data source] Flow input: record Id variable

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: [Data source] Einstein prompt template Id or API name

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: [Data source] Prompt template text input API name

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: 42 themes across 8 families. ORIGINAL: obsidian (default), midnight, graphite, ivory. NEUTRALS: dusk, slate, parchment, onyx, fog. GREENS/ORANGES: forest, ember, sage, copper, verdant. BLUES/GREYS: steel, mercury, arctic, indigo, glacier. MID-TONES: bordeaux, pewter, walnut, denim, moss. SF LIGHT: birch, mist, cashew, mineral, blush, chamois. WEALTH MGMT: bullion, prussian, coutts, vault, endowment, trust. BANKING: cobalt, heritage, civic, cardinal, meridian, union. Wealth and banking themes require a matching accentColor override — see documentation.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, shows 4 theme toggle buttons in the widget header for live switching during demos. Keep false in production.

property.name: profilePhotoUrl
property.label: [Header] Profile photo URL (optional)
property.description: HTTPS URL for avatar; overrides Flow/Contact when set.

property.name: textScalePercent
property.label: [Typography] Text size (%)
property.description: Scales widget text (85–160); 100 = default.

property.name: fieldKeyColor
property.label: [Theme] Field label color (optional)
property.description: Row label color (#hex or rgb/rgba). Blank = theme default.

property.name: coreCustomFieldsJson
property.label: [Data source] Core custom fields (JSON object)
property.description: Logical key to field API name, or flow:Var / flows:Var (requires profile assembly flow). Same pattern as Business Profile Widget.

property.name: profileAssemblyFlowApiName
property.label: [Data source] Profile assembly flow API name

property.name: profileAssemblyFlowRecordIdVariable
property.label: [Data source] Assembly flow input: record Id

property.name: profilePhotoFlowOutputVariable
property.label: [Profile assembly Flow] Profile photo output variable
property.description: Text output variable API name on the profile assembly flow whose value is the image URL. Same mapping as [Asm flow output] Profile photo URL if you prefer that slot.

property.name: flowRecordIdVariable
property.label: [Data source] Flow input: record Id variable

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: [Data source] Einstein prompt template Id or API name

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: [Data source] Prompt template text input API name

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: 42 themes across 8 families. ORIGINAL: obsidian (default), midnight, graphite, ivory. NEUTRALS: dusk, slate, parchment, onyx, fog. GREENS/ORANGES: forest, ember, sage, copper, verdant. BLUES/GREYS: steel, mercury, arctic, indigo, glacier. MID-TONES: bordeaux, pewter, walnut, denim, moss. SF LIGHT: birch, mist, cashew, mineral, blush, chamois. WEALTH MGMT: bullion, prussian, coutts, vault, endowment, trust. BANKING: cobalt, heritage, civic, cardinal, meridian, union. Wealth and banking themes require a matching accentColor override — see documentation.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, shows 4 theme toggle buttons in the widget header for live switching during demos. Keep false in production.

property.name: profilePhotoUrl
property.label: [Header] Profile photo URL (optional)
property.description: HTTPS URL for avatar; overrides Flow/Contact when set.

property.name: textScalePercent
property.label: [Typography] Text size (%)
property.description: Scales widget text (85–160); 100 = default.

property.name: fieldKeyColor
property.label: [Theme] Field label color (optional)
property.description: Row label color (#hex or rgb/rgba). Blank = theme default.
